subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Intended Lord! In truth, this event was a devastating wound, causing distress [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده باوفای حضرت مقصود فی الحقیقه این واقعه جریحه دامغه بود اسباب پریشانی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @business; financial; property matters, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
